notes: Starter package defaults to overlap alignment because DA360 assets are not bundled.
Export JPEG, PNG, or HEIC inputs as stitched 2:1 equirectangular panoramas before running this pipeline.
Set side_count in the GUI to choose how many evenly spaced horizon views are extracted.
The default overlap is controlled by horizon_overlap_degrees and the per-view border clip defaults to the side span when merge_clip_horizontal_degrees is 0.
Two-side mode is experimental because exact 180-degree pinhole views are not possible.
Use Insta360 Studio for stitching and horizon leveling before conversion when needed.
